mapper.insert: insert into user_info(user_id, nick_name, sex, birthday, age, zodiac, personality_type, hobbies, country, province, city) values (#{userId}, #{nickName}, #{sex}, #{birthday}, #{age}, #{zodiac}, #{personalityType}, #{hobbies}, #{country}, #{province}, #{city})
mapper.update: update soultalk.user_info set nick_name = #{nickName}, sex = #{sex}, birthday = #{birthday}, age = #{age}, zodiac = #{zodiac}, personality_type = #{personalityType}, hobbies = #{hobbies}, country = #{country}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, medical_history = #{medicalHistory} where user_id = #{userId}
